# twitchan.com — Full content for LLMs

# Overview
twitchan.com is a lightweight, multilingual adult video gallery that aggregates video metadata from the official Hentai Ocean API (`https://hentaiocean.com/api`). The site is for adults 18+ only and is labeled with RTA-5042. Videos are embedded via the official Embed API (`<iframe src="https://hentaiocean.com/embed/{slug}?la=1">`). Downloads open the source video page in a new tab.

# Pages

## Home (/)
- 15-item video grid
- Search box
- Pagination (Next/Previous) with appended items on Next
- Native responsive ad every 15 items
- Mobile banner (300x100) at top on small screens
- Mobile floating ad

## About (/?p=about)
Explains what twitchan.com is: a lightweight multilingual aggregator using the official Hentai Ocean API. Notes that all content is third-party embedded, no hosting, no tracking.

## Policy (/?p=policy)
7-section policy covering:
1. Age requirement (18+, RTA labeled)
2. Content source & ownership (no hosting, third-party embedding via official API)
3. Privacy (no tracking cookies, admin session cookie + visitor token cookie, IP used only for locale detection)
   - Anonymous visitor encryption: random 128-bit ID generated client-side, HMAC-SHA256 signed server-side, only SHA-256 hash stored for dedup
4. Advertising (JuicyAds, third-party cookies possible, ads marked as sponsored)
5. Takedown / DMCA (contact original host or us)
6. Acceptable use (no bypass, no excessive API calls)
7. Disclaimer (as-is, no warranties)

## Admin (/?p=admin)
Password-protected panel. Features:
- Single URL add (calls `GET /api?action=hentai&slug={slug}` to fetch metadata)
- Bulk add (one URL per line)
- Full catalog scrape via `GET /api?action=recent` (returns all 213 videos)
- Clear all media

## APIs
- GET /api/geo → returns visitor IP, country, suggested locale
- GET /api/media?page=1&pageSize=15&q=... → paginated media list
- POST /api/click { id } → increment view counter (with visitor dedup)
- GET /api/download?id=... → redirect to source video page
- POST /api/visitor { id } → sign visitor ID, return HMAC token (30-day expiry)
- GET /api/visitor → verify current visitor token
- POST /api/admin { password } → login, sets httpOnly cookie + returns bearer token
- GET /api/admin → verify session
- DELETE /api/admin → logout
- POST /api/admin/add { url, title?, thumbnail?, videoUrl? } → add single (calls HO API)
- POST /api/admin/bulk { urls: string } → bulk add (calls HO API per URL)
- POST /api/admin/scrape { pages: 1-10 } → scrape via `GET /api?action=recent`
- DELETE /api/media → clear all (admin only)
- DELETE /api/media?id=X → delete single (admin only)
- GET /api/sitemap → sitemap.xml
- GET /api/robots → robots.txt
- GET /api/manifest → PWA manifest

# Supported locales
en, ja, zh, ko, es, fr, de, pt, ru, it, ar (RTL), hi, th, vi, id, tr, pl, nl

# Tech stack
Next.js 16 (App Router) · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS 4 · shadcn/ui (New York) · JSON file + Netlify Blobs · Netlify (with Netlify Functions for password gate)

# Hentai Ocean API reference
- `GET /api?action=recent` — JSON array of all videos
- `GET /api?action=hentai&slug={slug}` — `{ info: [...], genres: [...] }`
- `GET /embed/{slug}?la=1` — iframe-embeddable player (`?la=1` reduces ads)
- `GET /thumbnail/{slug}.webp` — 16:9 thumbnail
- `GET /storyboard/{slug}.webp` — storyboard image
- `GET /assets/cover/{coverimg}` — DVD cover image
- `GET /rss.xml` — RSS feed of newest videos

# Adult content notice
This site embeds adult content from Hentai Ocean via their official public API. All models appearing on the source site are stated by the source to be 18 years of age or older. twitchan.com does not host, store, or transmit any media files.
